next_steps: Emergent transfer to the emergency department for hemodynamic monitoring and stabilization
Immediate ICD interrogation and device diagnostics review
Obtain stat laboratory studies including cardiac troponin, electrolytes (potassium/magnesium), digoxin level, and CBC
Point-of-care or formal echocardiogram to evaluate cardiac function and prosthetic valve integrity
Obtain blood cultures in view of the prosthetic valve and systemic symptoms
Initiate intravenous access and prepare for synchronized cardioversion if hemodynamically unstable
